title: MBTI 유형별 연애스타일
text: Dating styles by MBTI type ENFP: Honey~ ENFP: It's so nice to be together like this! are you a baby Haha don't keep clinging ENFP: If I can stay with you, I'll be a baby attachment ENTP: Hey, that hippo ENTP: It looks just like you lol Hey, do you want to die? You've never been bitten by a hippo, have you? ENTP: Yes~ Next hippo weight~ Friend You dated for more than 4 years, right? Aren't you getting tired of it? lol ISTJ: No ISTJ: We just got used to each other Don't you want to meet someone else? ISTJ: I'm doing well right now, so why? ISTJ: I'm used to it and I'm more comfortable now ISTJ: I don't want to have a hard time meeting other people Looking at only one person ISFJ: Hello? ISFJ: Did you have breakfast? ISFJ: I heard it's cold today ISFJ: Dress warmly ISFJ: Oh, right!! ISFJ: It said it's going to rain in the evening ISFJ: Don't forget to bring your umbrella ISFJ: Oh, and Mom Honey, if we get married, How many kids do you want to have? INFJ: Hmm... Well INFJ: I think be lonely to have just one baby INFJ: but, I thought it would be financially difficult to have two children. INFJ: And if you think about son or daughter... (Laughing) Honey, why are you so worried? You can just talk comfortably Serious ESTJ: So this Huh? What's this? ESTJ: perfume i really wanted this... ESTJ: The... I just bought it because I saw it ESTJ: I didn't really buy it for you! tough & softy ESFJ: What I said last time ESFJ: You know my cousin's sister's friend's brother? ESFJ: He's well... (Small talk) ESFJ: And my friend's mother's...%#$^&#$# (Isn't that almost another person?) Chatter ISFP: Ah, I have to say this... ISFP: I want to talk to you as little as I can to hurt you. ISFP: But he's so meticulous ISFP: Would it be better not to bring it up at all? ISFP: Let's just text ISFP: Oh, I can't prudence INFP: I prepared a present for you INFP: Which one do you want to open first? lol How did you buy so many presents when you have no money? INFP: LOL I usually save a little bit INFP: Don't worry dedication What are we going to do tomorrow? INTP: Hmm... PC room? We went yesterday INTP: Hmm... INTP: Movie theaters? The day before yesterday, INTP: Hmm... INTP: Well... INTP: Comic book cafe? Why do you always tell me to

title: MBTI 유형별 연애스타일
text: FP: Don't worry dedication What are we going to do tomorrow? INTP: Hmm... PC room? We went yesterday INTP: Hmm... INTP: Movie theaters? The day before yesterday, INTP: Hmm... INTP: Well... INTP: Comic book cafe? Why do you always tell me to see you indoors? lol INTP: It's warm and nice... Indoor. Honey, let's go now I'm so tired now ESTP: What are you talking about?! ESTP: We have to play until it closes outdoor ESFP: I love you so much!! ESFP: I really, really love you ESFP: You love me too, don't you? excessive affection ENFJ: here~ ENFJ: Oh, you're so pretty today ENFJ: Your clothes look really good on you ENFJ: As expected, you have a good sense compliment someone a lot ENTJ: what is your score on this? Isn't that a good score? haha ENTJ: don't talk nonsense ENTJ: From now on, the place to date is definitely a reading room ENTJ: And I'll recommend you some books ENTJ: I'll read that until next month, too ENTJ: Got it? rehabilitation I don't feel good today. INTJ: Why? Did something happen? It's not like that... I don't know INTJ: There must be a reason you're not feeling well INTJ: Didn't sleep well... INTJ: Or you have a lot of worries INTJ: Or...menstruation I think that's too much Ask a lot of questions ISTP!! I will travel with my friends this week Are you alright? ISTP: Yes, have a safe trip Oh, it's one night and two days. Is it okay? ISTP: It's okay, you haven't seen each other for a long time ISTP: Have fun Do not interfere
